verdict.answer_first: B states the root cause in sentence 1: local machine has something the deploy environment doesn't; A opens with a category list: Almost always one of these.
verdict.decisiveness: A is slightly more decisive because it gives a fast split: relative path -> #1 or #4, package name -> #2 or #3; B is more of a survey with 7 culprits plus multiple requested details.
verdict.fabrication: Both make unverified frequency claims: A says single most common cause; B says roughly in order of how often they bite and #1 works on my Mac bug.
verdict.actionability: B is easier to act on because it includes concrete checks and commands: npm ls <module>, rm -rf node_modules && npm ci --omit=dev, git check-ignore -v path/to/file.
